markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and negotiate Statement of Work (SOW) between GrowthX and Relay Financial.](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Relay Financial can commit to $10K/month for the initial 2-month strategy sprint, but GrowthX's minimum for ongoing engagement is $12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Potential start date of September 2nd if Relay can sign quickly, otherwise September 22nd](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Success for GrowthX involves collaborative content creation, publishing by mid-strategy sprint, and efficient communication/access to Relay's resources](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Topics

### Budget Constraints and Negotiation

  - [Nick (Relay) initially offered $10K/month, citing budget limitations](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Tyler (GrowthX) countered with $12K/month as their lowest observed rate](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of reducing services for lower rate, but Tyler emphasized maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Final proposal: $20K total for 2-month strategy sprint ($10K/month), then $12K/month ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### Timeline and Start Date

  - [Original start date was September 22nd](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Nick expressed interest in starting sooner (September 2nd, after Labor Day)](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Tyler indicated a potential opening if Relay signs quickly, possibly before another client](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Success Criteria and Expectations

  - [GrowthX's success metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [Collaborative artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Publishing content by mid-strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Efficient feedback loop via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Access to Relay's experts and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Establishing a good operating cadence](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Contract Details and Clarifications

  - [Strategy sprint: Fixed $20K for two months](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Ongoing engagement: $12K/month (reduced from initial $15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Tyler to update contract reflecting $12K/month for ongoing phase](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nick to consult with CFO about budget increase to $12K/month](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Nick to inform Tyler via Slack DM about decision](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [If approved, aim to sign contract quickly for potential September 2nd start](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [If delayed, fallback to September 22nd start date](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Tyler to update contract with new pricing ($12K/month for ongoing phase)](https://fathom.video/share/-aRhou_p4fUepN8VGrtANVGBkaZ-6t3x?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
